name: Parameter
description: An SSM Parameter Store parameter containing configuration data.

properties.name: ARN
properties.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the parameter.

properties.name: LastModifiedDate
properties.description: Date the parameter was last changed or updated.

properties.name: DataType
properties.description: The data type of the parameter.

properties.name: Selector
properties.description: Either the version number or the label used to retrieve the parameter value.

properties.name: SourceResult
properties.description: The raw result or response from the source.
